docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PELICAN DELIVERY,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FUNG, FRANCES MS. $240.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $255.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
